steps.title: Identify the claim to support
steps.content: The text claims that Yazzie tried to convey the ephemeral and dynamic qualities of ikaah, even though he preserved desacralized sandpaintings as objects. The best quotation should focus on process, movement, and public creation.

steps.title: Choose the process evidence
steps.content: A denies that preserved sandpaintings can authentically represent ikaah. B frames the works as accommodation to permanent art culture. D focuses on gift-giving and chemistry rather than the sandpainting process itself. The quotation about public creation, rituals, viewer attention, and shifting sand directly supports the claim. The answer is C.
